title: Dead Channel Protocol - Trust Fracture Beat Transition
prompt: Story: Dead Channel Protocol (dead-channel-protocol) | Hook: A ghost app predicts outages, deaths, and your next move. | Subgenre: techno/paranormal thriller | Tone: GROUNDED | Location: Smart-city control grid and abandoned transit nodes | Villain: Root Administrator | Villain worldview: Systems only become honest when people fear the output. | Motifs: error beeps, node maps, black-screen prompts. Beat: Trust Fracture. Create transition motion card suitable for chapter change moment with in-world typography-safe zones.
negativePrompt: Avoid low frame-rate jitter, avoid compression artifacts, avoid incoherent camera cuts, avoid on-screen logos/watermarks.
